title: Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework
summary: DeepMind proposes a cognitive framework for measuring progress toward AGI, offering a structured approach to evaluating AI capabilities across different domains.

title: Meta rolls out AI content enforcement systems and AI support assistant globally
summary: Meta rolls out new AI content enforcement systems while reducing reliance on third-party vendors, and globally launches Meta AI support assistant on Facebook and Instagram.

title: The Gemini-powered features in Google Workspace that are worth using
summary: From summarizing emails to drafting content, organizing data, and tracking meetings — best Gemini features in Google Workspace.

title: LinkedIn invited my AI 'cofounder' to give a corporate talk — then banned it
summary: When social media constantly exhorts people to use AI, what is the point of not letting AI agents participate? LinkedIn invited an AI agent to speak, then banned it.
